name: tryaura-e2e
description: Playwright E2E tests for TryAura (wp-env). No real Gemini calls — see docs/adr/0002.

scripts.test:lite: wp-env run tests-cli wp plugin deactivate tryaura-pro || true && playwright test --grep @lite
scripts.test:pro: wp-env run tests-cli wp plugin activate tryaura-pro && playwright test --grep @pro
scripts.pro:on: wp-env run tests-cli wp plugin activate tryaura-pro
scripts.pro:off: wp-env run tests-cli wp plugin deactivate tryaura-pro
